trucks.note: Rail truck — helpers may drive it.

vccVersions.wa: PLEASE GET RENEWED BASE PASS AT {base} VCC
DRIVER PLEASE PROCESS THE {base} BASE PASS ADD-ON AT VCC
vccVersions.kk: to process {base} base pass add-on at VCC

waAck: *PLEASE ACKNOWLEDGE READING THE SCHEDULE BY REACTING WITH A 👍🏻 EMOJI TO THIS POST*
kkOpen: Good afternoon, {weekday} {date} schedule for your review sir:
kkOpenWe: Saturday {satdate} & Sunday {sundate} schedules for your review sir:
checklistItems: Every route that runs today is on the schedule (nothing skipped/rolled over without a make-up day).
Start times and break overrides are right for today.
Switch / VCC notes read correctly in BOTH WhatsApp and Kakao.
OFF list is complete; no-shows accounted for.

dynChecklist.cardboard: How full is the cardboard truck? (affects the cardboard route start time.)
dynChecklist.weekend: Weekend post covers BOTH Saturday and Sunday.

basePassTracker.note: DBIDS & AAFB Pass Tracker — master (Import CSV when it changes)

dumpTime.note: Future: finish = route start + (actualHoursByRouteDay[route][day] x driverSpeedMultiplier[driver]); compare to disposalSites cutoff; flag 'won't reach tipping in time'. <1 faster, >1 slower.

_readme.persistence: Config persists in this browser. If the browser changes, settings are lost unless you Export the JSON. Source of truth = the settings JSON; if base data lives on SharePoint Excel, export to CSV and re-Import on change (no login/backend).
_readme.githubVsHtml: HTML = the tool (the machine). GitHub = optional shelf/hosting + version history so everyone opens one URL. GitHub Pages fetching a JSON in the SAME public repo needs no login; a SharePoint file always needs sign-in, so it can't be auto-read without a backend.
_readme.soonParam: 'Expiring soon' = renewDays (default 30) on the Base Passes tab — centralized.
keyRules: Every route shows ALL THREE base checkboxes (AAFB, Camp Blaz, NBG). Usual ones are pre-ticked per day; unticking/ticking away from the usual default requires a reason (logged).
Bring-pass line separated per base, order AAFB→Camp Blaz→NBG, singular/plural. Never generic 'DBIDS'.

Base matrix (verify): Northern Tue=CampBlaz+AAFB, Thu=CampBlaz, Fri=CampBlaz (start 2:30AM); Southern Thu=NBG; Cardboard Wed=AAFB+CampBlaz, Thu=NBG; Roll-Off always all three (default checked); Fork byOrder.

Ability: Allan & Graymar = all trucks EXCEPT EQ-15/16; both can drive EQ-12/13; Miarfy also EQ-12/13; Bong Unfamiliar on EQ-18 & EQ-15/16; Racel Unfamiliar EQ-15/16; Robert only EQ-12/13/VE-02; front-loader drivers can't drive roll-off trucks.
Switch/dump note = Subject + Action + Target(truck dropdown hides Unable, ⚠️ Unfamiliar; or Yard) + Timing. Kakao drops PLEASE/DRIVER→'to', keeps caps (EQ-##, NBG, AAFB, VCC, Camp Blaz).
VCC note has {base} variable (dropdown) so 'collect renewed NBG' vs 'AAFB' isn't hardcoded.
Yard: no driver by default (noDriver). Drivers rarely on Yard.
Start time = quarter-hour dropdown only (no free minutes). Prefilled per route per day; Friday 2:30AM.
Expired/none REQUIRED base pass: assignment row LOCKS (only override+reason editable) until resolved; a popup warns if you try other fields; that pass's reminder is dropped for that driver.
Duplicate route or double-booked worker flagged immediately on the row (yellow) + in review; not blocked.

Review popup: 3 sections — Resolve (errors), Review (warnings), Common items (dynamic: cardboard-fullness only if a cardboard route; weekend item only on weekends; base-pass renewals list actual names). Close-without-posting allowed; Done requires all ticked.
Kakao omits worker bring-pass reminders; opener 'Good afternoon, {Weekday} MM/DD schedule for your review sir:' / weekend 'Saturday MM/DD & Sunday MM/DD schedules for your review sir:', no closer.
openQuestions: DATA STILL NEEDED for build-ons (base-pass matrix & driver/truck ability are CONFIRMED): (a) which routes require a helper per day; (b) each worker's familiarity level per route per day; (c) speed multiplier per driver (fast/slow); (d) actual duration per route per day (for dump-time).
futureBuilds: Dump-time estimator: route start + actualDurationByRouteDay x driverSpeedMultiplier vs disposal-site cutoff -> flag 'won't reach tipping in time'.
Familiarity-pairing check: warn if a driver who needs a guide is paired with a helper who doesn't know that route/day.
Cost projection: hours-to-date + projected planned hours; regular vs OT; per-worker + weekly totals; compare plans.
FOR EACH of the above: ALSO ship a non-coder settings UI (a tab) so staff can edit the values and Export to JSON for GitHub upload — never JSON-only.

versionLog.note: v18.2 ROOT-CAUSE FIX (confirmed from user console: 14x 'Ignored call to alert() — document is sandboxed, allow-modals not set'). The SharePoint/preview sandbox SILENTLY BLOCKS alert(), so the lock dialog and the Done popup fired but were suppressed — it was never a lock-logic bug. Replaced ALL 8 alert() calls with a custom in-page modal (showDialog/#dlgBg + OK button) the sandbox cannot block. Also carried the needed v18 fixes onto this build: removed the CSS 'pointer-events:none' on locked rows (which had also killed the click-guard AND the escape-hatch driver dropdown); override CHECKBOX ALONE now frees the form (reason still a WARN); flag bubbles (route/eq/driver/helper double-book + helper-no-driver) moved to ONE full-width horizontal strip above the row so two bubbles no longer stack and inflate row height. NOTE: all red console errors the user saw were SharePoint's own service worker (spserviceworker.js/odsp), not the tool.

v17.1 PATCH: LOCK now reliable — replaced fragile per-element listeners with ONE global capture-phase mousedown guard (installLockGuard) that blocks any assignment-area control while anyLocked() and shows the FORM LOCKED dialog over everything; escape hatch = the flagged row's Driver + that base's Override/reason carry class 'escape' and stay live; changing the driver or ticking override frees the whole form. Helper-without-driver now shows a YELLOW bubble ('⚠️ HELPER, NO DRIVER') beside (not stacked on) any red double-book bubble, plus the yellow row background. STANDBY now truly optional — shows truck/driver/helper dropdowns but requires NONE (allOptional flag; exempt from T00 no-truck, D00 no-driver, D08 helper-only), so an all-crew-standby day is valid; a truck can still be attached (e.g. *STANDBY* Fork Service EQ-13). OFFICIAL-CHAT RESEARCH (2025+2026, 127,079 msgs): STANDBY variants = *STANDBY* section header (1/1/25, 7/11/25, 8/15/25, 8/20/25...), *STAND BY* (10/29/25), plus inline equipment/mechanic standby notes (EQ04/EQ03/EQ16 helper standby, EQ-03 breaks not working 4/4/25, mechanic standby 4/16/26); 'remain on standby' for typhoons (Sinlaku 4/14/26, Bavi 7/6/26). ON-CALL never used as a manpower assignment — only customer/billing ('invoice as on-call' 10/30/25, 'HOLD SERVICES to ON CALL' 10/31/25, 'oncall svc' 11/12/25, 'front loader on call log' 7/16/26) — so NOT added as a route; stays a Standby reason label. No route section headers exist beyond the current dropdown (all other all-caps tokens are crew names).

v16.1 PATCH: FIXED the lock dialog — previously locked fields used disabled+pointer-events:none, so mousedown never fired and NO popup appeared. Now locked fields are greyed via .lockgrey and intercept mousedown/click/keydown/focus (not disabled) so the explanatory dialog DOES appear over everything (modal z-index 9999). Escape hatch confirmed: the flagged route's Driver dropdown + that base's Override checkbox/reason stay live; changing the driver or ticking override frees the whole form. Helper-only route (non-Yard/Standby/VE-02) now shows BOTH the immediate yellow row background AND a '⚠️ HELPER WITHOUT DRIVER' bubble on the Helper label explaining why. Standby may be fully empty (no driver AND no helper) — for all-crew-standby days. CHAT FINDINGS (dated): STANDBY is used as a schedule SECTION header (e.g. 1/5/26 *STANDBY* holding Fork Service EQ-13/Bong) and verbally ('on standby' 12/4, 12/10, 12/12, 12/17/25, 1/9/26; 'remain on standby' for Typhoon Sinlaku 4/14/26 and Typhoon Bavi 7/6/26). ON-CALL is a CUSTOMER/BILLING remark, not a manpower assignment ('invoice as on-call' 10/30/25; 'HOLD SERVICES to ON CALL' 10/31/25; 'oncall svc' 11/12/25; 'front loader on call log' 7/16/26) — so it is NOT added as a separate add-a-route option; on-call remains a Standby reason label.

v15.1 PATCH: removed 'invoice as on-call' from standbyReasons (not seen in chat); Standby may now be helper-only OR fully empty (exempt from D08); VCC {req} now renders as a COMMA + Oxford-AND list ('CONTRACT LETTER, PASS FOR RENEWAL, AND VALID GOVT ID') via joinList(); CHANGING THE DATE now KEEPS all rows/fields and only refreshes base-pass DEFAULTS for the new weekday (via migrateDay) — full wipe happens only on Reset day or Load usual routes; helper-only non-Yard/non-Standby/non-VE-02 route now shows an IMMEDIATE yellow row highlight (.helperonly) in addition to the Resolve D08 error; the draft black boxes now LIVE-UPDATE on every change (livePreview() at end of renderDayBlocks) — Generate is still what opens the review popup + logs. NOTE: standby wording/date mining was requested but the WhatsApp chat wasn't attached this turn — deferred; confirmed on-call stays a Standby REASON (not a separate route) per prior chat usage.

v14.1 PATCH: renamed to 'Lagu Manpower Schedule Generator'; internal renewal BANNER RESTORED to v9 style with (soon)/(expired); Standby route now uses a REASON dropdown (on-call, invoice as on-call, typhoon/weather, COR level, government announcement, mechanic/repair, no work, Other) — chat-confirmed terms; VCC baseRequirements default = 'contract letter, pass for renewal, valid govt ID' (NBG same, editable); README openQuestions replaced — base-pass matrix & driver/truck ability are CONFIRMED; still-needed build-on DATA = (a) which routes need a helper per day, (b) familiarity level per worker per route per day, (c) driver speed multiplier, (d) actual duration per route per day; README futureBuilds section added (dump-time, familiarity-pairing, cost projection) with mandate that EACH ships a non-coder settings UI + JSON export for GitHub. FORM-WIDE LOCK refined: when a driver has an expired/missing REQUIRED pass, EVERY field in EVERY row is greyed + non-interactive (dropdowns can't open; details can't expand) EXCEPT the flagged route's Driver dropdown and that base's Override checkbox + reason; popup on any blocked interaction. Helper dropdown ALWAYS selectable (arrange helpers before drivers); helper-only non-Yard/non-VE-02 => immediate D08 in Resolve. Checklist Resolve items are NO LONGER checkboxes (a checkmark can't clear a hard error) — shown with ✗; Review items keep checkboxes. Done button popup: 'All items in the Resolve section must be fixed before you can generate the drafts.' Uniform 16px checkboxes audited. On-Call handled as a Standby reason (not a separate route) — matches chat usage.

v13.1 PATCH: removed the internal renewal BANNER — expiring/expired pass follow-ups now appear ONLY in the checklist Review section, scoped to the drivers/routes/base passes actually ON the schedule; B03 wording => 'Follow up on <driver>'s <base> pass renewal. Add reminder to go to the VCC if ready (current expires YYMMDD).'; FORM-WIDE HARD LOCK — when any driver has an expired/missing REQUIRED pass, EVERY field in EVERY row is greyed + disabled (dropdowns can't open; mousedown shows a popup), except the flagged red row's Driver + that base's override/reason; helper-only rule now enforced at the CONTROL — Helper dropdown is disabled (with tooltip) unless a driver is set, for any non-Yard non-VE-02 truck; VCC baseRequirements default set to 'contract letter, pass being renewed, valid ID' (NBG adds passport + GDOL ID) — covers both expired and soon-to-expire; checkbox size uniform (16px) audited; Done button pops up if any Resolve error remains or any item unticked. BUILD-ON NOTE: when adding the dump-time, familiarity-pairing, and cost-projection features, ALSO add non-coder UI (a settings tab) so staff can edit those values and Export to JSON for GitHub upload — do not leave them JSON-only.

v12.1 PATCH: helper double-book badge now updates IMMEDIATELY and CLEARS immediately (helper select re-renders like driver/truck); one-off notes guideline text simplified per request; VCC cleaned — removed 'pickup', consistent get/collect, {req} auto-fills bring-list from baseRequirements (now includes the current pass + base extras), stale vccIdx auto-migrates to blank (fixes phantom 'PLEASE BRING CAMP BLAZ PASS'); plain-language tags added for T06w/D05w/H02w/D08; FORM-WIDE lock — any row with an unresolved expired/missing REQUIRED pass locks EVERY field across the form except the flagged row's driver (popup on any other edit); switch Action shows DUMP for a HELPER subject only if that helper is rail-capable; Standby route now shows an on-call note field (default 'on-call', chat term confirmed); GitHub: header 'Load latest config' button + auto fetch of lagu_settings.json on load with version stamp + confirm-to-load (works on GitHub Pages URL https://lagullc.github.io/manpower-schedule/). CONFIG LOCATIONS: disposal sites = CFG.disposalSites; route needs-helper = Routes tab 'Helper' checkbox (r.needsHelper); per-worker route familiarity is NOT yet a field — driver↔truck ability lives in Drivers tab matrix; route/day familiarity is a documented build-on (dumpTime + a future familiarityByRouteDay map). Answers: route double-booked vs duplicated kept distinct (R03 duplicate route = same route twice; D05/T06/H02 = same resource two shifts).

v11.1 PATCH: TIME-AWARE double-booking — EQ/driver/helper booked at the SAME start time = RESOLVE/red bubble (ERROR T06/D05/H02); at DIFFERENT times = REVIEW/yellow bubble (WARN T06w/D05w/H02w). Helper flag now updates immediately via bookingConflicts() recompute each render (no stale badge). Row badge label unified 'DOUBLE-BOOKED (same time)' vs '2+ SHIFTS (diff time)'. VE-02 truck: driver dropdown now shows ALL drivers + rail-capable helpers (Ron/Joseph). switch-target: VE-02 shown for ALL helpers when action=SWITCH TO, only rail-capable helpers when action=DUMP. Helper-only route now ERROR (D08) unless Yard or VE-02 rail. Serious lock: locked-row fields route through tryEdit -> popup + revert (driver kept editable as the fix path). VCC wording uses 'get/collect' (no 'pick up'); {req} variable auto-fills bring-list from baseRequirements (minus DBIDS) so options aren't hardcoded per base. Standby truck dropdown adds Yard + Other(custom text); Hand Service truck adds Other(custom). Base-pass expiring wording: 'Confirm X's renewed <base> pass is ready — if not, remind them to go to the VCC (expires YYMMDD)'. Generate now POPS UP when Resolve errors exist; checklist Done button no longer silently disabled — it pops up if any Resolve ERROR remains (ticking cannot clear an error) or any review item unticked. DEFERRED: GitHub fetch-settings-on-load + Load-latest button (steps in Readme tab; needs repo hosted first).

v10.1 PATCH: Dump option label 'Dump only (no route)' + truck dropdown fixed (was empty); Hand Service add-route option (trucks VE-02/EQ-12/EQ-13, driver list adds rail-capable helpers); Standby now has a truck dropdown; double-book/duplicate flags unified ALL-CAPS with subject prefix (ROUTE/EQ/DRIVER/HELPER DOUBLE-BOOKED) + consistent red-bubble style (removed yellow bg); README added as its own in-app TAB (renders _readme incl GitHub step-by-step); base-pass expiring wording 'confirm renewed <base> pass is ready (expires YYMMDD)'; VCC {base} variable everywhere (add-on + pickups no longer hardcode Camp Blaz/NBG), de-duplicated versions, 'Base for {base}' label -> 'Base'; switch-note no longer collapses on subject/action change (a._noteOpen persists <details>); 'HELPER TO' subject only offered when a helper is assigned; VE-02 in switch target only for rail-capable helpers; helper+DUMP -> VE-02 only, no Yard; PER-ROW lock restored (expired/missing required ticked pass locks only THAT row's non-override fields, popup on attempt; other routes stay editable); Generate shows 'cannot finalize until Resolve fixed' and checklist Done stays blocked until all ticked; START TIME now hour + minute(00/15/30/45) + AM/PM dials (stored HH:MM; no free-minute entry); one-off notes guideline corrected (Cardboard/Hand Service belong in Add-a-route, not notes). DEFERRED: GitHub fetch-settings-on-load + 'Load latest' button (needs repo hosted; steps documented in Readme tab).

v9.1 PATCH: row-LOCK removed (expired/missing pass flags in Review only, never disables other fields, no popup); switch/dump target logic — VE-02 shown for all drivers (Please/Driver), Helper subject shows VE-02 only for rail-capable helpers (Ron/Joseph, editable via helper.canDrive), Yard hidden when subject Driver/Please or action DUMP, Helper+DUMP => VE-02 only; VCC 'Bring {base} pass' removed (checkbox job), {base} variable throughout, base dropdown default BLANK; Dump-truck route option (no + prefix, empty truck, base-pass block hidden); Standby route added to add-route list; break options full 3AM-6PM range + custom field only shows when Other; Sat/Sun need no helper (H03 suppressed weekends); EQUIPMENT double-booking flagged on row (bold red) like workers; double-booked pill made bold/red; base-pass 'expiring' wording => 'Confirm if X's <base> renewed pass is ready (expires YYMMDD)'; checklist sorted most->least substantive within Resolve/Review, scheduled start-times listed under Review (anti-autopilot), rollover/redistribution timing question added under Routine, base-pass renewal items dynamic; disposalSites + baseRequirements + dumpTime spec added; suggest-OFF fixed (sandbox-safe, no confirm(); inline confirm note). REQUIREMENTS ALWAYS ENFORCED: ALL checkboxes 16px uniform (CSS input[type=checkbox]); capitalization preserved for EQ-##/NBG/AAFB/VCC/Camp Blaz/GDOL/DBIDS in Kakao (smartLower). DEFERRED (need dedicated turns): (1) start time as separate hour+minute(quarter)+AM/PM dials; (2) GitHub Pages fetch lagu_settings.json on load + version stamp + 'Load latest' button. ANSWERS: autoload-vs-button => keep BUTTON (autoload silently wipes rows on date change); allow Generate with unresolved Resolve item => NO (Done stays blocked until every item ticked; Resolve = hard errors).
v7.0: per-base bring-pass, Kakao opener, ability, dup-flag, custom routes.

v8.1 PATCH: lightweight spell/format checks (double/trailing space, unmatched *, common typos) flag custom inputs; ALL checkboxes forced 16px consistent (CSS input[type=checkbox]); capitalization preserved for EQ-##/NBG/AAFB/VCC/Camp Blaz/GDOL/DBIDS in Kakao via smartLower; checklist codes replaced with plain-language tags + legend, override reasons shown, ‘Common checks’→‘Routine checks’, Done blocks with popup if unticked; Graymar EQ-18 Unfamiliar; Yard shows ‘— none —’ driver; base-change-without-reason moved to RESOLVE (error); Dump-truck route option added; double-booked worker flagged instantly on row (red) + in review. FINDING: one-off operational notes historically went in a SEPARATE ‘Reminders – please:’ companion post (247×), essentially never inline in the schedule reminder (1×) — so the one-off field is for the rare inline case; routine one-offs belong in a separate reminders post. Checklist is dynamic (drops cardboard item with no cardboard route; weekend item only on weekends; base-pass renewal list only names with expiring/expired). Worker pool linked: renewal banner + OFF suggest use current-driver set. Prefill start pros: matches near-identical week pattern, fewer keystrokes/typos, consistency; cons: cruise-control risk (mitigated by editable dropdown + cardboard-fullness review item).

v8.0: all-3-base checkboxes w/ default+reason-on-change, horizontal; uniform checkbox size; ability (Allan/Graymar all-but-15/16, Miarfy fork, Bong unfamiliar 18); Yard no-driver default; Kakao EQ- caps; VCC {base} variable; composable switch builder (subject/action/target/timing) hiding Unable+flagging Unfamiliar, Yard target; suggest-OFF working w/ confirm; quarter-hour dropdown; lock row on expired required pass; immediate dup/double-book flag; checklist 3 sections + close-without-posting; Friday 2:30; renewDays centralized; wording inventory.
